title: Auto Armor
description: This mod is created by @TheEpitex youtube channel. Equip best Armor for player automatically.
body:
Epitex — Smart Auto-Armor

Never manually swap armor again.

Auto Armor is a lightweight _server-side_ mod that automatically equips the best armor from your inventory — instantly and intelligently.

It evaluates armor stats, enchantments, and durability value to always keep you optimally protected.

<hr>

✨ _**Features**_

• **Automatic Armor Equipping** — instantly equips better armor when found

• **Smart Comparison System** — evaluates:
  - Armor points
  - Toughness
  - Protection enchantments
  - Utility enchantments (Unbreaking, Mending, etc.)

• **Curse Detection** — avoids equipping armor with Binding Curse

• **Elytra Protection** — will NOT replace your Elytra when equipped

• **Real-Time Updates** — reacts to:
  - Inventory changes
  - Player join
  - Armor breaking

• **Balanced Scoring System** — chooses upgrades intelligently, not blindly

<hr>

⚠️ _**Important Note**_

Auto Armor will only replace gear if it is strictly better based on its scoring system.

Elytra is always respected — your chestplate will not override it.

<hr>

🎮 _**Controls**_

O — Toggle Auto Armor ON/OFF (with keybind configuration)

<hr>

📋 _**How It Works**_

• Scans your inventory periodically

• Compares every armor piece against what you're wearing

• Calculates a score based on:
  - Base armor stats
  - Toughness
  - Enchantments (Protection, Unbreaking, Mending, etc.)
  - Curse penalties

• Automatically swaps only when a better option is found

• Fully respects your toggle state

• Works seamlessly in the background

<hr>

🛠 _**Compatibility**_

• Minecraft 1.21.10, 26.1.2

• Fabric

• No extra dependencies

• Server-side for full functionality

<hr>

_**Installation**_

1. Download the latest .jar
   
2. Drop it into your mods folder
   
3. DONE!

<hr>

Perfect for:

• PvP players

• Hardcore survival runs

• Speedrunners

• Inventory-minimal players

• Anyone who forgets to upgrade armor mid-game

<hr>
